headline: DS wind-down run (epic #80): 5 issues closed — #83 (token-contrast violations fixed), #59 (HdsTooltip on Radix), #54 (CI-email triage), #62 (data-brand primary + data-tenant alias), #48 (Satoshi-only typography; Satoshi Bold replaces Clash Display). Chromatic Storybook publishing pipeline, lilac-bonds tenant contract + tokens, and MetadataList `divided` variant + footer all live at 0.11.0. Deletion/teardown cluster (#49/#50/#51/#53) scoped as a coordinated ATTENDED teardown; archive/* branches (archive/docs-app, archive/portfolio, archive/local-ai) preserved server-side before any removal.
next: Execute the teardown cluster: #51 (strip the docs app + resolve #56 — relocate HdsSystemDocLayout pages/hds → layouts/ first, dead-code-separate, unwire the ~23 page-scanning scripts + guardrail registry, repoint vercel.json to Storybook), #49 (delete portfolio assets/apps outright), #50 (archive+strip local-AI), #53 (consolidate 27 md docs → ~5). Attended — lead reviews before merge.
Human-owned, out of scope for autonomous work: #47 (Figma Code Connect), #48 Figma text-style swap
